title: tilia tuan var. chinensis
intro: Tilia tuan var. chinensis, also known as Chinese linden or Tilia chinensis, is a deciduous tree species in the Tilia genus, commonly found in China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Tilia tuan var. chinensis include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes and irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Tilia tuan var. chinensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to calm the mind and body, and to treat various health conditions.
